summary: Test downgrades the pinned rfc2119 version in generated .claude/settings.json and .github/workflows/2119.yml to 0.4.0 and adds a foreign other.yml, runs init --refresh, then asserts both generated artifacts are re-pinned to PKG_VERSION while the foreign file is byte-for-byte unchanged — rejects both the stale-pin and clobbers-foreign-content counterexamples.
